title: dolicholobium glabrum
intro: Dolicholobium glabrum is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the smooth dolicholobium or glabrous dolicholobium. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dolicholobium glabrum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wound healing and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Dolicholobium glabrum can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
